profile: Sales Director / VP Sales (senior leadership in sales)

candidate.name: Sample VP Sales
candidate.cvText:
VP of Sales, EMEA at Confluent
London, UK
14 years sales; 6 years leadership.

VP Sales, EMEA · Confluent · London, UK
- Built and scaled EMEA sales org from 4 → 28 quota-carrying reps; managed a team of 32
- £45M ARR, 124% to plan FY24; reported into CRO, board updates quarterly
- Hiring, OKRs, pipeline hygiene, forecasting cadence, territory planning
- Director of Sales prior — promoted after 2 years scaling Mid-Market segment
- VP of, head of, leadership; strategic deal coaching, MEDDPICC enforcement
- Built revenue org playbooks, GTM motion design, P&L ownership for the region
knownIssues: Matcher gap B5 (this repo): Leadership CV → senior IC role: only family penalty (leadership→sales = -10) applies, no role-step-down penalty. ae-ic Good (69) below is a matcher artefact — VP stepping down to Senior IC AE should be Partial.

Matcher bug B4 (this repo): Title family classifier overweights leadership terms. 'VP of Marketing, EMEA' classifies as 'leadership' family rather than 'marketing', missing the cross-family penalty entirely. vp-marketing Good (70) below is wrong — should be Partial.

jobs.title: Sales Director, UK & Ireland
jobs.note: Same family, one level down — appropriate.

jobs.title: Chief Revenue Officer, EMEA
jobs.note: Leadership family adjacent; one level up.

jobs.title: Senior Account Executive
jobs.note: B5: VP → senior IC AE step-down only -10 penalty, lands at Good (69). SHOULD be Partial.

jobs.title: VP of Marketing, EMEA
jobs.note: B4: Title classifier flags 'VP of...' as leadership family, masking the marketing cross-family penalty. Matcher returns Good (70). SHOULD be Partial.

jobs.title: Sales Director, US East
jobs.note: Same family + level, cross-region (US) onsite — location floor cap.
